propositions: Plan-review suffers excess iteration from a ~50-67% per-round BLOCK rate with 87% of blocking findings new each round.
A single defect fans out into up to 10 blocking findings across criteria in one round, inflating remediation.
The convergence rising floor never engages in BLOCK loops because eligibility requires a prior CERTIFIED signature that blocking verdicts never mint (240 ineligible reviews).
Coaching notes and criteria-guide deep-links attach only to advisory findings, never to the blocking findings agents must remediate.
Plan authors are not routed to the plan-review criteria guide, so first drafts predictably fail the LLM tier.
The T5c security overlay contributes a large advisory wall including out-of-scope findings without producing blocks.
